title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 Overview

detail.title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 is expected to be released soon in the first or second week of April 2026 by the Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB). Check expected date, official websites, steps to download the marksheet, previous year pass percentage, and revaluation details.

content.text: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 is expected to be released soon in the first or second week of April 2026 by the Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB). Students who appeared for the 2nd PUC (Pre-University Course) Exam 1 held from February 28 to March 17, 2026, are eagerly waiting for their results.

The board usually announces the Karnataka 2nd PUC results through a press conference followed by activation of the official result portal. Last year, the result was declared on April 8, 2025. Students can check their marks on the official websites karresults.nic.in and kseab.karnataka.gov.in using their registration number. This article provides complete details on expected date, time, steps to download the marksheet, and previous year trends.

rows: Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB)
First or Second Week of April 2026

sections.heading: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 Expected Date and Time

content.text: The Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 is likely to be announced in the first or second week of April 2026. According to past trends and recent updates, the result may be declared around April 7 to April 10, 2026, possibly at 11:00 AM. The Karnataka 1st PUC Result 2026 was declared on March 31, 2026. The board is expected to hold a press conference before activating the result links on the official portals.

items: Click Here: Result Link 1
Click Here: Result Link 2

sections.heading: How to Check Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026?

items: Visit the official result website: karresults.nic.in or kseab.karnataka.gov.in.
On the homepage, click on the link for “Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026” or “II PUC Result 2026”.
Enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth (or select stream if required).
Click on Submit or View Result.
Your marksheet will appear on the screen.
Download and take a printout of the provisional marks memo for future reference.

sections.heading: Previous Year Karnataka 2nd PUC Result Trends

items: 2025 Result Date: April 8, 2025
Overall Pass Percentage (2025): Around 73-81% (varies by stream)
Girls generally record higher pass percentage than boys.
Science stream usually has the highest pass percentage followed by Commerce and Arts.
